overview.zh: 干式格子型球磨机是一种高效的研磨设备，广泛应用于选矿、建材、化工等行业。其特点是筒体内设有格子装置，使研磨的物料能够快速排出，提高生产效率和处理能力。干式作业方式特别适合需要干燥研磨的物料，无需添加水，可有效控制产品水分含量，广泛应用于水泥、化工、陶瓷等领域。
overview.en: The dry grid ball mill is an efficient grinding equipment widely used in mineral processing, building materials, chemical industry and other fields. Its feature is the grid device inside the cylinder, which allows the ground material to be discharged quickly, improving production efficiency and processing capacity. The dry operation method is particularly suitable for materials that require dry grinding, without the need for water, effectively controlling the moisture content of the product, widely used in cement, chemical, ceramic and other fields.

features.zh: 格子型筒体结构，排矿速度快，研磨效率高
features.en: Grid-type cylinder structure for fast discharge and high grinding efficiency

features.zh: 干式作业，无需用水，可控制产品水分含量
features.en: Dry operation, no water required, can control product moisture content

features.zh: 衬板采用耐磨材料，使用寿命长
features.en: Liners made of wear-resistant materials for long service life

features.zh: 进出料系统设计合理，粉尘少，环保性好
features.en: Reasonably designed feeding and discharging system, less dust, good environmental protection

features.zh: 可根据物料特性定制工艺参数
features.en: Process parameters can be customized according to material characteristics

description.zh: 金属矿石如铜、铁、铅锌等矿物的干式研磨处理
description.en: Dry grinding of metal ores such as copper, iron, lead, and zinc

description.zh: 水泥生产中的原料粉磨和水泥粉磨
description.en: Raw material grinding and cement grinding in cement production

description.zh: 陶瓷原料的干法粉碎和研磨
description.en: Dry crushing and grinding of ceramic raw materials

description.zh: 化工行业需要干燥研磨的物料处理
description.en: Processing of materials in the chemical industry that require dry grinding

zh: 数据为参考值，实际参数可能因物料特性而异
可根据客户需求定制不同规格设备
建议与工程师联系获取详细技术参数
en: Data are reference values, actual parameters may vary depending on material characteristics
Different specifications can be customized according to customer requirements
It is recommended to contact engineers for detailed technical parameters
